description: You are a Project Manager at Ironclad Builders, LLC. Create a formal construction bid proposal for the 'Lone Star Credit Union — South Lamar Branch Office Renovation' project using the project details, cost breakdown, schedule, and team information found in '/home/ga/Documents/project_data.json'. The professional proposal must include a Cover Page, Executive Summary, Scope of Work (using Heading 2 for subsections), Cost Summary Table, Project Schedule Table, and Qualifications & References. Ensure the document uses proper 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2' styles, an automatic Table of Contents, and page numbers in the footer. Save the final document as '/home/ga/Documents/Ironclad_Bid_Proposal_LSCU.odt'.
